calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce
David Zalob, Esq. for and with Plaintiff Chi-Wing Wong.
Defendant Nicole L. Archibald present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of the action With Prejudice.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for immediate restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 1430 - 46th Avenue, San Francisco. Defendant pay $2,500.00, less $700.00 in forfeited security deposit, for a balance of $1800.00 in monthly installments of $150.00 by cash, money order or cashier's check to Plaintiff's attorney beginning June 15, 2004. If Defendant complies with the terms, Plaintiff to dismiss with prejudice.
If the Defendant fails to comply with the terms, Plaintiff shall upon ex parte application and declaration to the Court, obtain a Judgment for all rents and per diem damages in the amount of $6,000.00 minus credit for any monies paid by Defendant. Forfeiture of the rental agreement and mutual releases with Civil Code 1542 waiver. Plaintiff to send a written stipulation to Defendant. Defendant agrees to sign and return stipulation within one week of receipt. All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
